name: Pasta with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccini conventionally on the stove and drain.
2. In a microwave-safe bowl, heat oil over high (100%) for 2 minutes.
3. Add onions and garlic to the hot oil and cook at high (100%) for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in walnuts and cook for another 2 minutes at high (100%).
5. Mix in grated Parmesan cheese and sour cream, then cook at high (100%) for 1½ to 2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds.
6. Season the mixture with pepper to taste.
7. Toss cooked fettuccini in butter and top with walnut sauce.
